item.title: 人工智能机器人初创企业Rhoda在新一轮融资中估值达17亿美元
item.description:
罗达利用广泛可用的网络视频，对工业机器人进行多种工况的训练

【原文：

Rhoda uses widely available internet video to train industrial robots for a variety of conditions

】

item.title: 美国成屋销售量上升，购房负担能力改善
item.description: 美国二手房销售量在2月份意外上升，且上月数据被上调，这得益于抵押贷款利率下降以及要价温和增长。【原文：Sales of previously owned US homes unexpectedly rose in February and the prior month was revised up, helped by a decline in mortgage rates and modest growth in asking prices.】

item.title: 谷歌将为五角大楼提供人工智能代理，用于非机密工作
item.description: 据一位高级国防官员透露，字母表公司旗下的谷歌正在五角大楼三百万名员工中推广人工智能代理，以实现例行工作的自动化。【原文：Alphabet Inc.’s Google is introducing artificial intelligence agents across the Pentagon’s three million-strong workforce to automate routine jobs, according to a senior defense official.】

item.title: 斯塔格威尔首席执行官认为竞争对手的动荡将带来新业务
item.description: 斯塔格威尔公司首席执行官马克·彭恩表示，竞争对手的动荡局面以及充满争议的中期选举周期将支撑公司今年的业绩表现。【原文：Stagwell Inc. Chief Executive Officer Mark Penn said disruption among competitors and a contentious midterm cycle will support the company’s performance this year.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚初选搅乱选举预测 推动债券反弹
item.description: 哥伦比亚初选使五月总统大选局势变得扑朔迷离，重燃了市场对亲商新政府的期待，并推动主权债券价格反弹。【原文：Colombia’s primaries have thrown the May presidential election wide open, reviving hopes for a new market-friendly administration and triggering a rebound in sovereign bonds.】

item.title: US Natural Gas Extends Losses on Mild Weather, Global Price Drop
item.description: 美国天然气期货连续第二日下跌，因天气预报显示气温将回升，表明供暖和发电厂燃料需求将下降。【原文：US natural gas futures fell for a second day as weather forecasts shifted warmer, indicating lower demand for the heating and power-plant fuel.】

item.title: 索诺斯推出售价299美元的便携式Play音箱，结束新品荒
item.description: 索诺斯公司推出两款新音箱——这是该公司逾一年来首次发布消费级硬件产品——此前该公司耗费2025年修复其臭名昭著的应用程序事故造成的负面影响。【原文：Sonos Inc. introduced two new speakers — its first consumer hardware launch in more than a year — after spending 2025 repairing the fallout from its infamous app debacle.】

item.title: Creditors of Wall Street-Backed MFS Claim £1.3 Billion Shortfall
item.description: 根据最新法庭文件显示，英国倒闭抵押贷款公司Market Financial Solutions Ltd.的债权人面临13亿英镑（18亿美元）的资金缺口，并发现其与公司所有者存在密切关联的企业网络。【原文：Creditors of Market Financial Solutions Ltd., the failed UK mortgage company, are facing a shortfall of £1.3 billion ($1.8 billion) and have discovered a network of companies that were closely linked to its owner, according to fresh court filings.】

item.title: 博阿兹·温斯坦正通过对私有资产的折扣报价"买入悲观情绪"
item.description:
对冲基金经理提出收购蓝猫基金和喜达屋基金中失望的投资者——并表示这只是开始。【原文：

The hedge-fund manager offers to buy out frustrated investors in Blue Owl and Starwood funds — and says he’s just getting started

】

item.title: 苹果599美元的MacBook Neo颠覆笔记本行业格局：评测
item.description: The $599 MacBook Neo, available in stores this Wednesday, proves that it’s possible to make a laptop that stays true to Apple Inc.’s reputation for craftsmanship, performance and reliability — even at roughly half the price of the popular MacBook Air. By reaching that price point, the company is opening up macOS to a completely new market of first-time buyers who previously couldn’t afford to splurge, or simply preferred not to.

item.title: 以色列初创企业Jazz为人工智能数据防丢失技术筹集6100万美元
item.description: 以色列初创公司Jazz获得6100万美元融资，用于打造基于人工智能的数据防丢失平台。【原文：Israel’s Jazz raised $61 million in funding to create a platform that uses artificial intelligence to tackle data loss prevention.】

item.title: 英伟达将投资Thinking Machines实验室并提供人工智能芯片
item.description: 英伟达公司正对人工智能公司Thinking Machines Lab进行新一轮投资，该公司由前OpenAI高管米拉·穆拉蒂创立。英伟达将为该初创企业提供芯片，助力其人工智能模型的训练与运行。【原文：Nvidia Corp. is making a new investment in Thinking Machines Lab, an artificial intelligence company founded by former OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and will supply chips to help train and run the startup’s AI models.】

item.title: 巴西GPA公司与债权人达成庭外债务重组协议
item.description: 巴西分销公司宣布与主要债权人达成协议，将提交庭外重组方案，这家巴西零售商正着手重组其债务。【原文：Companhia Brasileira de Distribuição announced an agreement with its main creditors to file an out-of-court restructuring plan as the Brazilian retailer reworks its debt.】

item.title: SpaceX助力安省教师退休金计划实现收益增长，尽管私募股权投资出现亏损
item.description: 安大略教师养老金计划去年收益率达6.7%，因股票、黄金及SpaceX公司股价上涨，抵消了私募股权投资中异常巨大的亏损。【原文：Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan earned 6.7% last year as the rising value of stocks, gold and SpaceX helped to offset an unusually large loss in private equity.】

item.title: 智利经济学家放弃押注三月降息，因伊朗战争持续
item.description: 智利经济学家已撤回此前对央行3月24日决议降息0.25个百分点的预期，因中东冲突推高油价并加剧全球不确定性。【原文：Chile economists scrapped their calls for a quarter-point interest rate cut at the central bank’s March 24 decision, as conflict in the Middle East drives up both oil prices and global uncertainty.】

item.title: 支付公司SumUp据称正寻求银行家为其欧洲首次公开募股（IPO）提供服务
item.description: 知情人士透露，金融科技公司SumUp Payments Ltd.在考虑美国上市后，现正邀请多家银行竞标其在欧洲首次公开募股（IPO）的承销业务。【原文：Financial technology company SumUp Payments Ltd. is inviting banks to pitch for roles on an initial public offering in Europe, according to people familiar with the matter, after the company considered a US listing.】

item.title: 油价短暂突破每桶100美元，凸显股市通胀风险
item.description: 上周，摩根士丹利表示，油价需维持在每桶100美元以上，才能动摇该行对美国股市的乐观预期。Evercore ISI则指出，当原油价格处于93至97美元区间时，将预示股市即将下跌。【原文：Last week, Morgan Stanley said oil would need to remain over $100 a barrel to dislodge the bank’s bullish outlook for US stocks. Evercore ISI said crude priced between $93 and $97 would signal that equities are headed for a drop.】

item.title: 阿根廷债券涨势受垃圾级评级与战争余波制约
item.description: 在总统哈维尔·米莱于纽约会见投资者、试图吸引市场对阿根廷经济复苏故事的关注之际，该国债券市场的上涨势头已基本停滞。【原文：As President Javier Milei meets investors in New York in a bid to attract interest in Argentina’s comeback story, the momentum behind the country’s bonds has largely stalled.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪器：海峡对几乎所有非伊朗关联船只关闭
item.description: 随着中东冲突进入第二周，霍尔木兹海峡除伊朗相关航运外，几乎所有船只仍被有效封锁。【原文：The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to almost all but Iran-linked traffic with the conflict in the Middle East now in its second week.】

item.title: 美国期货走势平淡，因交易员对战争结束的信心减弱
item.description: 美国股市反弹势头在开盘前戛然而止，因投资者对伊朗冲突可能结束的信心逐渐减弱。【原文：The rebound in US stocks stalled ahead of the bell as investors’ assurance around a potential end to the conflict in Iran waned.】

item.title: 凯雷计划推出复杂信贷工具以启动旗舰基金
item.description: 随着私募股权公司出售收购企业、偿还基金投资者以及为新基金筹集资金所需时间的延长，凯雷集团正采取一项独特解决方案：一项规模达数十亿美元的结构化融资。【原文：As private equity firms take longer to sell off companies they’ve bought, pay back investors in their funds, and raise money for new vehicles, Carlyle Group Inc. is turning to a unique solution: a multibillion-dollar structured financing.】

item.title: 霍尼韦尔航空启动160亿美元债券发售计划
item.description: 霍尼韦尔航空公司已启动其首次美国投资级债券发售，计划筹集高达160亿美元资金，为即将进行的业务分拆做准备。【原文：Honeywell Aerospace Inc. has begun its inaugural US investment-grade bond sale, targeting as much as $16 billion as it prepares for a planned spinoff.】

item.title: 美银称市场误读美联储对油价飙升的反应
item.description: 美国银行警告称，押注美联储将对油价上涨采取鹰派应对措施的投资者可能误判了美联储的动向。该行指出，供应冲击同样可能导致利率维持稳定甚至大幅下调。【原文：Investors betting on a hawkish response to rising oil prices could be misreading the Federal Reserve, according to Bank of America Corp., which warns that supply shocks can also result in periods of stable interest rates and even deep cuts.】

item.title: 中国科技圈正因OpenClaw的热潮与产品而沸腾
item.description: 构建开源人工智能代理的热潮正达到顶峰【原文：Excitement for building open source AI agents is reaching fever pitch】

item.title: 人工智能与机器人正日益推动中国出口热潮
item.description: 广东工厂工人经历的坎坷历程，为未来发展敲响警钟【原文：Factory workers in Guangdong provide a cautionary tale of the bumpy path ahead】

item.title: 法律人工智能初创公司Legora为美国扩张筹集5.5亿美元
item.description: 瑞典法律人工智能初创公司Legora在由Accel领投的D轮融资中筹集了5.5亿美元，估值较去年10月融资时翻了三倍，达到55.5亿美元，该公司正寻求在美国市场扩张。【原文：Swedish legal artificial intelligence startup Legora has raised $550 million in a Series D funding round led by Accel, tripling its valuation from an October round to $5.55 billion as it seeks to expand in the US.】

item.title: 亚马逊携巨额跨境债券重返债务市场
item.description: 亚马逊公司正通过大规模跨境债券发行重返债券市场，此举进一步加剧了人工智能浪潮中领头企业的大规模融资热潮。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. is returning to the bond market with a jumbo cross-border offering, adding to a borrowing spree among companies spearheading the artificial intelligence boom.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：BioNTech、科尔士百货、Teladoc、Vertex制药、Zevra
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点44分，标普500指数期货下跌0.1%，此前因特朗普总统暗示中东战争可能即将结束，周一市场出现了一波反弹行情。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down 0.1% as of 7:44 a.m. in New York following Monday’s relief rally that came after President Donald Trump signaled the war in the Middle East could end soon.】

item.title: 日本深化与莱纳斯稀土合作，全球寻求供应保障
item.description: 莱纳斯稀土公司已获得日本承诺，将以长期保障价格采购关键材料，这再次印证了中国供应紧缩带来的持久影响。【原文：Lynas Rare Earths Ltd. won a commitment from Japan to pay guaranteed long-term prices for the critical materials, the latest sign of the enduring impact of China’s supply squeeze.】

item.title: 阿联酋炼油厂因附近遭无人机袭击而暂停运营
item.description: 据知情人士透露，阿联酋鲁韦斯地区最大的炼油厂因无人机袭击引发工业区火灾而暂停运营。【原文：The biggest oil refinery at Ruwais in the United Arab Emirates halted operations after a drone strike caused a fire in the industrial area in which it’s located, according to people familiar with the matter.】
